name: Wilderness Sighting, Surprise, and Wandering Monsters
description: Wilderness sighting runs 40-240 yards (inches are tens of yards above ground); surprise as below ground but at 10-30 yards, three or more monsters ringing the party, those at 10 yards attacking at once. Daily at day's end check the lost/encounter matrix by terrain; afloat or aloft roll twice — 5 for a midday waterborne/aerial adventure, 6 for a normal one (ships continually at sea: a single daily roll, encountering on 6).
